title: parosela tomentosa var. psoraleoides
intro: Parosela tomentosa var. psoraleoides is a lesser-known plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is also known as Psoralidium or 'broomweed' due to its similar properties to the broomweed plant. The medicinal properties of Parosela tomentosa var. psoraleoides include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and it is used to treat conditions such as inflammation, fever, and skin conditions, as well as to support immune function and cardiovascular health.
